programs.title: Dictators' Hideouts S1 - "Ceausescu's Delusions of Grandeur"
programs.desc: Casa Poporlui is the magnum opus of Romania’s most bloodthirsty dictator, Nicolae Ceausescu, and hides secrets of an extensive underground bunker system.

programs.title: Future Food S1 - "Episode 5"
programs.desc: Nigerian Minister of Agriculture Akinwunmi Ayo Adesina believes it is his job to ensure Nigerians eat food grown in Nigeria, and he's determined to overcome the obstacles to Nigerian self-sufficiency in food production.

programs.title: Future Food S1 - "Episode 6"
programs.desc: Shanghai-based social media agency Resonance apply their branding skills to convince young Chinese that farming could be a viable career choice.

programs.title: Journey to Planet Earth S2 - "Future Conditional"
programs.desc: Looks at the spread of air and water pollution and how contamination in one area can affect people and animals living thousands of miles away.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Suing Our Way To Space"
programs.desc: Cowboy hat-wearing billionaires have reasons for their multi-billion dollar investment in space exploration but it’s hard to ignore how much money they stand to make.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Will Satellites Help Us Save or Exploit Earth?"
programs.sub_title: Will Satellites Help Us Save or Exploit Earth?
programs.desc: Our long-term survival on this planet depends on advanced satellites keeping us connected and keeping an eye on the Earth from orbit.
